title: Probability and Statistics
objective: Compute the mean of 5 random values. Generate 5 values using math.random(1,100), compute their average, and store in particle.x.

title: Advanced Dynamic Systems
objective: Model a damped harmonic oscillator. Apply a restoring force proportional to -particle.x and a damping force proportional to -particle.vx. After 60 frames, particle.x should approach 0.
